title: Delete Recommendation
content:
# Delete Recommendation

Permanently delete an existing Recommendation. Recommendations with `states` tagged as `accepted` or `auto_accepted` can not be deleted. This action cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.

## Endpoint

`POST /recommendations/{recommendation_id}/delete`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.recommendation.deleteRecommendation()
print(response)

parameters.name: recommendation_id
parameters.description: Recommendation key `id` to delete. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
